title: cyclosorus dicarpus
intro: Cyclosorus dicarpus, also known as the Indian rhinitis fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus dicarpus include relief from respiratory problems, fever reduction, and treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal purposes, but it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it.
